'''Shibb Nisshil''' was an [[Ishi Tib/Legends|Ishi Tib]] who worked for the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] in the [[Science Outpost]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Dathomir/Legends|Dathomir]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] and showed interest in [[Rancor/Legends|rancors]].
